name: Field Note Civic Labs
summary: Field Note Civic Labs helps small teams use AI on real administrative work, on-site or remotely: records, documents, spreadsheets, email, and recurring review tasks.
audience: people handling intake, review, policies, public records, or internal working knowledge

services.name: Workflow mapping
services.description: Choose a starting workflow and map the files, emails, decisions, people, dates, and review steps around it.

services.name: Source-checkable review
services.description: Show what arrived, what was reviewed, what still needs a decision, and what source each answer came from.

services.name: Reusable process design
services.description: Leave behind prompts, checklists, review notes, spreadsheets, small scripts, or lightweight tools where useful.

services.name: Document intake and sorting
services.description: Sort incoming files, preserve originals, flag uncertain items, and keep a record of what changed.

services.name: Records monitoring
services.description: Watch public or internal records, filter out noise, and produce a short note showing what changed and where it came from.

fieldNotes.name: Records Monitoring
fieldNotes.description: Watch public or internal records, filter out noise, and show what changed.

fieldNotes.name: Document Intake and Sorting
fieldNotes.description: Sort incoming files, preserve originals, flag uncertain items, and keep a record of what changed.

fieldNotes.name: Financial Statement and Tax Workflows
fieldNotes.description: Clean up recurring statement or CSV review, spot duplicates or exceptions, and produce a short review report.

fieldNotes.name: Small Strata Governance Tools
fieldNotes.description: Help small strata councils keep recurring governance work clearer.

fieldNotes.name: AI Opportunity Review
fieldNotes.description: Turn a loose AI idea into a short practical brief before a team commits budget or time.

boundaries: Small strata governance tools are governance workflow support, not legal advice.
AI should support human review and should not hide the basis for important decisions.
